2606.27069.title: Towards Explainable Adjudicative Variance: Quantifying Judicial Discretion via Gated Multi-Task Learning
2606.27069.paper_summary: Legal outcome prediction must disentangle objective case facts from adjudicative context. Merit-based rulings rely on factual evidence while technical disposals may hinge on judicial discretion. We propose a Judge-Aware Gated Multi-Task Learning architecture that explicitly models this distinction. We introduce a fine-grained outcome taxonomy to supervise the encoder, enforcing a structural regularization that disentangles distinct semantic pathways. This granular legal curriculum enables our Gated Fusion mechanism to dynamically modulate reliance on judge identity. We evaluate our approach on 13,937 UK Employment Tribunal decisions. We benchmark our design against supervised fine-tuning (SFT) of a Gemma-4 26B-A4B backbone, in which judge identity and the taxonomy are injected as prompt tokens or autoregressive output targets. The two contextual signals compose only weakly when forced through a single autoregressive channel. In contrast, coupling a LoRA-adapted Gemma-4 encoder with our gated architecture defines a new state of the art on this benchmark while requiring an order of magnitude fewer trainable parameters than the generative SFT baselines, with gains concentrated on the most ambiguous and rarest outcome classes. Beyond accuracy, the architecture is interpretable; learned judge embeddings and calibration profiles localize the cases where adjudicative context drives the prediction. These results indicate that, for identity-conditioned classification of legal outcomes, the choice of conditioning interface dominates scale: differentiable structured composition yields more accurate, more parameter-efficient models than prompt-based composition over a substantially larger backbone.
2606.27069.paper_summary_zh: 法律結果預測必須將客觀案件事實與裁決背景區分開來。基於實質的裁決依賴於事實證據，而技術性處置可能取決於司法裁量。我們提出了一種法官感知的門控多任務學習架構，明確建模這一區別。我們引入了一個細粒度的結果分類法來監督編碼器，強制結構正則化，以區分不同的語義路徑。這種細緻的法律課程使我們的門控融合機制能夠動態調節對法官身份的依賴。我們在13,937個英國勞動法庭的裁決上評估我們的方法。我們將我們的設計與Gemma-4 26B-A4B骨幹的監督微調(SFT)進行基準比較，其中法官身份和分類法被注入為提示標記或自回歸輸出目標。當被迫通過單一自回歸通道時，這兩個上下文信號僅弱相關。相反，將LoRA調整的Gemma-4編碼器與我們的門控架構結合，定義了這一基準的新最先進技術，同時所需的可訓練參數數量比生成的SFT基線少一個數量級，增益集中在最模糊和最稀有的結果類別上。除了準確性外，該架構是可解釋的；學習到的法官嵌入和校準檔案定位了裁決背景驅動預測的案例。這些結果表明，對於基於身份的法律結果分類，條件介面的選擇主導了規模：可微分的結構組合比基於提示的組合在實質上更準確、更具參數效率。
2606.27069.author: Stanisław Sójka et.al.
2606.27069.authors: Stanisław Sójka, Felix Steffek, Matthias Grabmair
